# Archive — Sessions

These files have been **merged into the canonical docs** and are preserved here
for traceability and reference only.

The canonical versions are in `docs/notes/`.

## What was in session 2026-03-18

Observable decomposition session. Key contributions:
- Formalized pre-scope substrates for r_ss, var_rel, lambda_proxy, σ²(θ)
- Introduced R(π) / Z(π) / F0 (observable range and exclusion zone)
- Found θ* in CASE-0001 is a scope transition, not a regime boundary
- Established lambda_proxy as structurally insufficient by construction
- Raised Q_NEW_1–12 (see `docs/notes/open_questions.md`)

New documents added to the repo in this session:
`docs/advanced/observable_decomposition.md`, `docs/advanced/observable_consequences.md`,
`docs/advanced/latent_degrees_of_freedom.md`, `docs/glossary/observable_range.md`
